responses: Hi! I'm Proxima — your AI-powered academic assistant 😊 How can I help you study today?
Hello! Ready to tackle your studies? What do you need help with?
Hey there! I'm here to make your academic life easier. What's up?
I'd be happy to help with academic Q&A! What specific topic or concept do you need explained?
Academic Q&A is one of my specialties! What's your question about?
Tell me your academic question and I'll give you a clear, accurate explanation!
Paste your notes here and I'll create a concise summary with all the key points!
Notes summarization ready! Share your class notes and I'll make them much shorter and easier to review.
I can summarize your notes in seconds. Just paste them here!
I can help you track deadlines! Tell me about your assignments and exams with their due dates.
Never miss a deadline again! Add your assignment and exam dates and I'll remind you.
Deadline alerts activated! What assignments or exams do you need reminders for?
Let's create a personalized study plan! Tell me your subjects, exam dates, and available study time.
I can build custom study plans based on your goals and schedule. What are you preparing for?
Study plans are my specialty! Share your courses and deadlines for a perfect schedule.
I can help track your study progress! Log your study sessions and test scores to see your improvement.
Progress tracking coming right up! Start logging your study time and quiz scores.
Let's monitor your academic journey. Share your recent study stats!
You've got this! Every page you study brings you closer to your goals. Small steps lead to big wins! 💪
Remember why you started! Consistency beats perfection. Just 25 minutes now will make you proud later.
You're stronger than your excuses! One study session at a time. Progress, not perfection! 🚀
